weekly_observations: Zero trades for the second consecutive bootstrap week: every premarket scan returned an empty watchlist (0 candidates), so the strategy never fired and Bull sat in cash through a calm, mildly risk-on week (VIX ~15.4-15.9, SPY trending up +1.54%) -- the entire -1.54% relative shortfall is opportunity cost, not bad trades. The root cause is confirmed structural and NOT a timing issue: a mid-session re-run (~12:38 PM ET) still produced 0 candidates because premarket_scan.py computes IEX-feed rel_vol as today cumulative daily-bar volume / prior full-day volume, which almost never clears the 1.5x gate intraday, compounded by the gap-up >=2% requirement. Top priority for next Monday is a maintenance/code session on premarket_scan.py (minute-bar rel_vol vs a time-of-day baseline, or relaxed rel_vol/gap thresholds) before any parameter tuning -- there is no point analyzing signals until at least one trade exists. Also note daily_pnl.json and EOD journal entries were never written this week; equity is unchanged at $100k. Fixed a ClickUp bug (hardcoded status "open" -> CRTSK_001) so reports now post.
